summary: Comprehensive testing of 22 product management fixes in the admin platform. All critical features verified working via UI interaction and code review. TypeScript compiles clean (tsc --noEmit = 0 errors). All product form features, intake question behaviors, visibility conditions, and navigation flows confirmed working.
critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in ProductDetail.tsx (Lines 169, 376): missing useEffect/useMemo dependencies (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps). Non-critical but could cause subtle bugs with stale closures. Consider adding eslint-disable comments or adding missing deps.
The frontend.err.log contained old TypeScript errors (pre-fix) that are now resolved. tsc --noEmit passes clean.

liger-inc partner code returns 404 - the partner org may not exist in this preview environment, so store-facing OfferingCard tests for liger-inc products could not be tested via UI (code review confirms logic is correct).

verified_features.fix_1_bulletslist_compile: PASS - BulletsList uses bullets.length correctly; bullets can be added/removed on General and Store Card tabs
verified_features.fix_2_typescript_types: PASS - Product interface in types.ts has card_description, card_tag, card_bullets, price_rounding, show_price_breakdown. tsc --noEmit returns 0
verified_features.fix_3_tab_persistence: PASS - Admin tab reads ?tab= URL param; ?tab=catalog activates Products tab; localStorage persistence also works
verified_features.fix_4_category_placeholder: PASS - Category Select shows 'Select category' placeholder when form.category is empty/undefined
verified_features.fix_5_country_dropdown: PASS - When field='country' in visibility condition builder, a Select with 'Select country...' placeholder shows instead of text input
verified_features.fix_6_save_questions_btn: PASS - 'Save questions' button visible in intake section (Pricing tab, internal checkout)
verified_features.fix_7_tooltip_position: PASS - Tooltip field appears directly below Helper text (Label -> Helper Text -> Tooltip order confirmed in UI)
verified_features.fix_8_required_affects_conditional: PASS - Required and Affects price toggles only visible when question Enabled=true; header shows 'disabled' badge when off
verified_features.fix_9_auto_required_on_affects: PASS - Toggling 'Affects price' ON automatically sets Required to checked=true
verified_features.fix_10_no_price_floor: PASS - Only 'Price ceiling cap' section shown; no price floor UI element
verified_features.fix_11_boolean_no_checkbox_dup: PASS - Boolean question shows single 'Affects price' MiniToggle in flags row (no duplicate checkbox)
verified_features.fix_12_boolean_price_mode: PASS - Boolean question with affects_price=true shows Add/subtract (±) and Multiply (×) radio options
verified_features.fix_13_dropdown_no_default: PASS - Code confirms: defaults[q.key] = '' for dropdown type (no auto-selection of first option). From ProductDetail.tsx line 165
verified_features.fix_14_price_mode_fieldname: PASS - OfferingCard.tsx uses q.price_mode (not price_impact_mode). getStartingPrice correctly skips multiply-mode questions
verified_features.fix_15_reorder_stable_keys: PASS - Question reordering works: moved Question A (Dropdown) below Question B (YesNo) via down arrow; stable keys confirmed (key={q.key || `q_${i}`})
verified_features.fix_16_back_to_catalog: PASS - 'Back to Products' button navigates to /admin?tab=catalog; catalog tab is active
verified_features.fix_17_tab_url_param: PASS - Admin.tsx reads searchParams.get('tab') on initial render; ?tab=catalog loads Products tab active
verified_features.fix_18_store_card_bullets: PASS - Store Card tab has BulletsList for card_bullets; add/remove works without 'items.length' error
verified_features.fix_19_pricing_internal_default: PASS - EMPTY_FORM has pricing_type: 'internal'; Internal Checkout card highlighted by default
verified_features.fix_20_price_rounding_select: PASS - Price rounding Select with 'No rounding', 'Round to nearest 25/50/100' options. Value none->'' conversion works
verified_features.fix_21_show_breakdown_toggle: PASS - Show price breakdown Select shows 'No — show total only' by default; toggles to 'Yes — show line-by-line breakdown'
verified_features.fix_22_visibility_group_logic: PASS - Conditional visibility builder loads with Country field as default; country field shows Select dropdown

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 22 fixes verified working. Platform admin partner code is 'automate-accounts'. Product editor at /admin/products/new. liger-inc partner code returns 404 in this preview env (tenant may not exist). ESLint warnings in ProductDetail.tsx (missing deps) are pre-existing, non-critical. Frontend compiles clean with no TypeScript errors. Key areas: ProductForm.tsx (BulletsList, pricing, visibility), IntakeSchemaBuilder.tsx (tooltip order, conditional toggles, price mode), Admin.tsx (URL tab param), ProductEditor.tsx (back button to catalog).
rca_of_issues: The TypeScript errors in frontend.err.log were from a PRIOR compilation run before the types.ts fix was applied. The file was modified at 23:23, server started at 23:24, and initial webpack build showed old errors before hot-reload re-compiled. tsc --noEmit confirms current state is clean.
